requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 220 V / 50 Hz / Type C and E Plug (CNI / IEC)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——220V / 50Hz / C型与E型插头（CNI / IEC）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——220V / 50Hz / C型與E型插頭（CNI / IEC）

summary.en: Côte d'Ivoire operates on 220 V / 50 Hz mains supply. Standard plugs are Type C (Europlug, two round pins) and Type E (French standard, two round pins with earth socket in wall, Schuko-compatible), inherited from the French colonial infrastructure. Wireless and IoT devices with mains power supplies must comply with IEC 62368-1 (audio/video, IT and communications equipment safety) or IEC 60950-1 (legacy) as referenced by CNI (Comité National de Normalisation des TIC). French-language safety labelling is required. Test reports from an ARTCI-recognised or ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratory must be included in the ARTCI homologation dossier.
summary.zh: 科特迪瓦使用220V / 50Hz市电供应。标准插头为C型（欧洲插头，两圆脚）和E型（法式标准，两圆脚带壁式接地插座，兼容Schuko），沿用自法国殖民时期基础设施。使用市电电源的无线及物联网设备须符合CNI（国家信息通信技术标准化委员会）参考的IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息技术及通信设备安全）或IEC 60950-1（旧版）标准。须使用法语安全标注。ARTCI准入认证文件须附有ARTCI认可或ILAC/MRA认可实验室的测试报告。
summary.zht: 科特迪瓦使用220V / 50Hz市電供應。標準插頭為C型（歐洲插頭，兩圓腳）和E型（法式標準，兩圓腳帶壁式接地插座，兼容Schuko），沿用自法國殖民時期基礎設施。使用市電電源的無線及物聯網裝置須符合CNI（國家資訊通訊技術標準化委員會）參考的IEC 62368-1（音視頻、資訊技術及通訊設備安全）或IEC 60950-1（舊版）標準。須使用法語安全標注。ARTCI準入認證文件須附有ARTCI認可或ILAC/MRA認可實驗室的測試報告。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1 (audio/video, IT and communications equipment safety — referenced by CNI)
IEC 60950-1 (IT equipment safety, legacy — referenced by CNI)
CEE 7/16 Type C plug (Europlug) and CEE 7/5 Type E plug (French standard, Schuko-compatible)
220 V / 50 Hz mains specification (Côte d'Ivoire national grid)

summary.en: Chinese devices are certified to GB 4943.1 (IT equipment electrical safety, equivalent to IEC 60950-1) or GB/T 20600 (IEC 62368-1 aligned) via CCC (China Compulsory Certification). Mains voltage is 220 V / 50 Hz — the same as Côte d'Ivoire — so voltage compatibility is generally not an issue. However, Chinese plugs are Type I (GB 2099.1, two or three flat pins at an angle), which are not compatible with Ivorian Type C/E sockets. Safety labelling is in Chinese rather than French.
summary.zh: 中国设备通过CCC（中国强制认证）取得GB 4943.1（信息技术设备电气安全，等同IEC 60950-1）或GB/T 20600（与IEC 62368-1接轨）认证。市电电压为220V / 50Hz，与科特迪瓦相同，电压兼容性通常不成问题。但中国插头为I型（GB 2099.1，两脚或三脚斜插），与科特迪瓦C/E型插座不兼容。安全标注为中文而非法文。
summary.zht: 中國設備通過CCC（中國強制認證）取得GB 4943.1（資訊技術設備電氣安全，等同IEC 60950-1）或GB/T 20600（與IEC 62368-1接軌）認證。市電電壓為220V / 50Hz，與科特迪瓦相同，電壓兼容性通常不成問題。但中國插頭為I型（GB 2099.1，兩腳或三腳斜插），與科特迪瓦C/E型插座不兼容。安全標注為中文而非法文。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 (ITE electrical safety — CCC scope, IEC 60950-1 equivalent)
GB 2099.1 / GB 1002 (Chinese plug/socket standard — Type I)

gap.en: Partial gap: mains voltage (220 V / 50 Hz) is identical so no electrical conversion is needed. Key gaps are: (1) plug type — Chinese Type I plug must be changed to Type C/E for the Ivorian market; (2) safety labelling must be in French; (3) IEC 62368-1 test reports to CNI-referenced standards from an ARTCI-recognised or ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratory are required for the homologation dossier; Chinese CCC certificates alone are not accepted by ARTCI.
gap.zh: 部分差距：市电电压（220V / 50Hz）相同，无需电气转换。主要差距：（1）插头类型——须将中国I型插头改为科特迪瓦市场使用的C/E型；（2）安全标注须使用法语；（3）准入认证文件须附有ARTCI认可或ILAC/MRA认可实验室按CNI参考标准出具的IEC 62368-1测试报告；仅凭中国CCC证书不被ARTCI接受。
gap.zht: 部分差距：市電電壓（220V / 50Hz）相同，無需電氣轉換。主要差距：（1）插頭類型——須將中國I型插頭改為科特迪瓦市場使用的C/E型；（2）安全標注須使用法語；（3）準入認證文件須附有ARTCI認可或ILAC/MRA認可實驗室按CNI參考標準出具的IEC 62368-1測試報告；僅憑中國CCC證書不被ARTCI接受。

source.publisher: ARTCI — Autorité de Régulation des Télécommunications/TIC de Côte d'Ivoire

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese CCC electrical safety certificates are not accepted by ARTCI. The product plug must be adapted to Type C/E; safety documentation must be in French; and IEC 62368-1 test reports to CNI-referenced standards from an ARTCI-recognised or ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratory are required in the ARTCI homologation dossier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国CCC电气安全证书不被ARTCI接受。产品插头须适配C/E型；安全文件须使用法语；准入认证文件须附有ARTCI认可或ILAC/MRA认可实验室按CNI参考标准出具的IEC 62368-1测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國CCC電氣安全證書不被ARTCI接受。產品插頭須適配C/E型；安全文件須使用法語；準入認證文件須附有ARTCI認可或ILAC/MRA認可實驗室按CNI參考標準出具的IEC 62368-1測試報告。
